title: Session Manager + Backup Engine — Backup Integrity Verification Pipeline
description: test_session_manager.py and test_backup_engine.py cluster with suite-api/apps/api/session_router.py. The backup engine tracks backup jobs with SHA-256 checksums and restore test results. Gap: backup_engine.create_backup() records a backup job but does not actually copy files — it is a metadata-only tracker. Session manager handles CRUD but does not integrate with the SSO bridge for JWT-session synchronization.
missing: Real backup executor: implement BackupJob.execute() that compresses and copies the target SQLite DB files to the configured destination path or S3 bucket
Backup integrity verification: scheduled job that restores a backup to a temp path, runs integrity checks (SHA-256 + row counts), and records the result
SSO → session sync: when SSO bridge invalidates a token, also invalidate the corresponding session in session_manager to prevent session fixation
